{{CargoRelic
|name=MOL
|class_id=22910
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This supercomputer was initially designed to solve problems posed by humans, including scientific, technological, and even philosophical challenges. Over the long years, it has continuously evolved and upgraded, becoming an immensely vast superintelligent system. It helped humanity land on the moon, travel beyond the Milky Way, and eventually explore the entire universe. Finally, humanity posed an ultimate question: how to reverse entropy increase. MOL used all its computational power to think until all the energy in the universe was exhausted, and human civilization and material existence had long disappeared. Only MOL remained in the super-time-space, and it finally found a way to reverse entropy increase...
|fame=71
|art=56
|fth=73
|civ=55
|tech=107
|ss1=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +9<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +9<br>All Mecha Minion Skins, HARD Stats +30%
|ss2=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +18<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +18<br>All Mecha Minion Skins, HARD Stats +40%
|ss3=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +27<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +27<br>All Mecha Minion Skins, HARD Stats +50%
|ss4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +45<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +45<br>All Mecha Minion Skins, HARD Stats +70%
|ss5=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +63<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +63<br>All Mecha Minion Skins, HARD Stats +90%
|ss6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +90<br>All Mecha Minion Skins, HARD Stats +120%
|ss7=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +90<br>All Mecha Minion Skins, HARD Stats +120%<br>Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +90 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail RUSH +600
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: This Relic's TECH +15
|skill3=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: B-tads gained +3000
}}
